Modern, versatile, and packed with smart features, this 2020 Ford Escape SEL is a compact SUV designed to fit your everyday lifestyle. With its sleek design, efficient performance, and comfortable interior, the Escape SEL is perfect for both city driving and weekend getaways.

Powered by a 1.5L EcoBoost engine paired with a smooth automatic transmission, the Escape delivers a great balance of power and fuel efficiency. Its confident handling and responsive steering make every drive enjoyable.

Vehicle Description
The 2018 Honda Pilot Touring with 142,011 km has been reconditioned with an oil and filter change, four-wheel alignment, four-wheel brake service, and a new set of tires. This All Wheel Drive SUV is powered by a 3.5L V6 SOHC 24V i-VTEC engine with direct injection and paired to a 9-Speed Automatic transmission with grade logic control, offering smooth performance and practical capability for family use. Finished in Crystal Black Pearl with a black interior, the Touring trim represents the upper end of the Pilot lineup, adding leather upholstery, a 540-watt premium audio system, Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration, a heated steering wheel, heated and ventilated front bucket seats, and 20 alloy wheels. Service history is available, and CarFax reports one event in the amount of $2,376.00. This vehicle has completed a full mechanical inspection, brake and tire measurements, a certified technician road test, and professional interior and exterior detailing as part of Steele Auto Group's reconditioning standards. If you are comparing three-row SUVs and want a well-maintained 2018 Honda Pilot Touring AWD with documented service work, we invite you to book a viewing and test drive to evaluate it in person.

description:
**2017 Volkswagen Golf SportWagen Comfortline | Heated Seats | Touchscreen | MVI Only** 
 
Spacious, refined, and ready for real life the Golf SportWagen Comfortline blends European driving dynamics with Canadian practicality. Whether you're hauling gear, groceries, or heading out for a weekend escape, this wagon delivers comfort and versatility in every kilometre.

This 2017 Volkswagen Golf SportWagen Comfortline offers a smooth and efficient drive thanks to its 1.8L turbocharged engine and front-wheel drive configuration. With its wagon body style, you get generous cargo space without sacrificing style or handling. The Comfortline trim adds premium features and thoughtful touches that make every drive more enjoyable.

- **Performance & Safety**

  - 1.8L TSI turbocharged 4-cylinder engine  
  - 6-speed automatic transmission  
  - Front-wheel drive  
  - Electronic Stability Control (ESC)  
  - Anti-lock Braking System (ABS)  
  - Rear-view camera  
  - Advanced airbag system with front, side, and curtain airbags  
  - Tire Pressure Monitoring System (TPMS)

- **Comfort & Tech**

  - Heated front seats  
  - Touchscreen infotainment system  
  - Bluetooth connectivity  
  - USB and auxiliary input  
  - Leatherette seating surfaces  
  - Power-adjustable drivers seat  
  - Air conditioning with cabin air filter  
  - Split-folding rear seats for added cargo flexibility  
  - Roof rails for extra utility

Contact Steele Subaru in Halifax today to schedule your test drive and explore the value of this Golf SportWagen Comfortline.

**MVI ONLY**  

This vehicle is part of our MVI Only Used Cars inventory an affordable option for buyers who don't mind a little elbow grease. Like a fixer-upper home, these vehicles might need some TLC after purchase, but they've all been fully inspected and come with a valid 2-year Nova Scotia Motor Vehicle Inspection (MVI). A copy of the inspection report and a list of any recommended or required work will be provided. We also include a Carfax Vehicle History Report for full transparency. These vehicles are priced for immediate sale and offer a great opportunity for the right buyer to get on the road at a budget-friendly price.

**Disclaimer:** While every effort has been made to identify and disclose known or visible issues during our inspection process, additional repairs may be required. Symptoms such as warning lights, abnormal noises (including squeaks, rattles, or whines), or performance concerns may require further diagnosis. Please note that sealed components such as engines, transmissions, and clutches are not dismantled or internally inspected. It is the sole responsibility of the purchaser to address any repairs or maintenance needs beyond those required to meet the standards of a valid Nova Scotia Motor Vehicle Inspection (MVI). We also recommend that purchasers obtain an independent inspection of the vehicle prior to purchase.

8 Speakers, Alloy wheels, AM/FM radio: SiriusXM, Automatic temperature control, Bluetooth Mobile Phone Connectivity, CD player, Dual front impact airbags, Dual front side impact airbags, Electronic Stability Control, Exterior Parking Camera Rear, Front dual zone A/C, Front fog lights, Heated Front Comfort Seats, Leather steering wheel, Leatherette Seating Surfaces, Power driver seat, Power passenger seat, Radio: Composition Media w/6.5 Touchscreen, Steering wheel mounted audio controls, Tachometer, Telescoping steering wheel, Tilt steering wheel.

description:
Red 1982 Ferrari Mondial

The Ferrari Mondial (Type F108) is a mid-engined, V8, grand tourer manufactured and marketed by Ferrari between 1980 and 1993  with styling by Pininfarina and bodywork by Carrozzeria Scaglietti.

Offered as either a 2+2 coupe or cabriolet, the Mondial has the slightly higher roofline, greater dimensions and increased weight to accommodate occasional rear seating for children or small adults.

The Mondial replaced the Ferrari 308/208 GT4 coupe and remains the last V8, rear mid-engined, 2+2 Ferrari.

The name Mondial, French for global, reflected its worldwide conformance with 1980 safety and emission standards  as well as the company's prominent motor racing victories. Ferrari had used the nameplate in the 1950s to celebrate Formula 1 World Championships and again in the 1970s to mark its Formula 1 World Constructors Championships.
